title: Supreme Court ruling cements authoritarian government (Guest Opinion by David M. Driesen)
summary: Opinion piece by Syracuse University Law Professor David M. Driesen critiquing a Supreme Court ruling as enabling authoritarian presidential power. This is external commentary on federal judicial decisions with no direct operational relevance to Syracuse city government.

political_signal.description: Academic expert raising constitutional concerns about judicial decisions affecting executive power limits. May reflect broader civic discourse climate.
